title: austrobuxus ovalis
intro: Austrobuxus ovalis, also known as the Queensland box or oval-leaved box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Australian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Austrobuxus ovalis has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and modern herbal preparations may include extracts or capsules for convenient use.
